title: 为每个用户故事增加第二智能体评分与最多两轮自动重构
summary: 新增 Reviewer Agent follow-up pass 与最多两轮 Executor 自动重构回路，执行结果会以 structured reviewSummary/reviewLoop 的形式回写到 task memory、execution checkpoint 和 story evidence，并在低分达到上限时稳定落为 pendingReview。

tests.outputSummary: TypeScript type-check, ESLint, and esbuild all passed after the reviewer loop integration.
Full VS Code extension test suite passed, including the new reviewer/refactor prompt and review metadata round-trip assertions.

riskReasons: The story changes Ralph core execution orchestration in src/extension.ts.
Reviewer and executor follow-up passes still depend on prompt quality instead of a separately isolated runtime.
releaseNotes: Story execution now enters a Reviewer Agent pass before finalizing completion.
Low-scoring stories can trigger up to two targeted Executor auto-refactor rounds.
reviewSummary and reviewLoop metadata are now persisted with task memory, checkpoints, and evidence artifacts.
rollbackHints: Revert src/extension.ts, src/promptContext.ts, src/storyReview.ts, and the artifact schema changes together to restore the previous single-pass completion flow.
If rollback is partial, ensure reviewSummary/reviewLoop fields are also removed from taskMemory, executionCheckpoint, storyEvidence, and their tests.
followUps: Consider exposing the review passing threshold and max auto-refactor rounds as user settings.
Evaluate whether Reviewer Agent should eventually use an independent model selection path.

dimensions.label: Architecture Consistency
dimensions.summary: 新能力通过独立 review module 与 extension orchestration 收口，没有把评分逻辑散落到多个 artifact 模块。

dimensions.label: Acceptance Coverage
dimensions.summary: execution chain、评分结构、自动重构上限、structured artifacts 和最终状态流转都已有实现与断言。

dimensions.label: Change Scope Control
dimensions.summary: 文件改动集中在 reviewer loop 所需主干模块和测试，没有牵动 PRD 或无关生成物。

dimensions.label: Verifiability
dimensions.summary: 编译与整套扩展测试均通过，新测试验证了 reviewer/refactor prompt contract 与 review metadata 持久化。

findings: Reviewer Agent 评分与自动重构回路已经成为故事完成链的一部分。
